  1. org.eclipse.collections.api.map
  2. MutableOrderedMap

Uses of Interface
org.eclipse.collections.api.map.MutableOrderedMap

Packages that use MutableOrderedMap
Package
Description
org.eclipse.collections.api.factory.map.ordered
This package contains factory API for creating instances of type MutableOrderedMap.
org.eclipse.collections.api.map
This package contains interfaces for map API which enhance the performance and functionality of Map
org.eclipse.collections.api.map.sorted
This package contains mutable and immutable sorted map interfaces.
org.eclipse.collections.impl.factory
This package contains static utilities for creating mutable and immutable collection factories.
org.eclipse.collections.impl.map.ordered.mutable
 
org.eclipse.collections.impl.map.sorted.mutable
This package contains implementations of the MutableSortedMap interface.
